testsuite.name: Formulario de Contacto

testcase.name: Envío exitoso del formulario de contacto con dataset reutilizable

testsuite.system-err: mar 31, 2026 5:36:44 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTENCIA: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 mar 31, 2026 5:36:44 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 ADVERTENCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.164. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.33.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
